stagev6_feature_inputs: Copied directly from stagev5.zip generated E/M/L feature directories.
early: stagev2 implementation definitions as materialized in stagev5 output/features/E/raw_stagev2
middle: stagev2 implementation definitions as materialized in stagev5 output/features/M/raw_stagev2; sample means are recomputed by loader
late: stagev4 unmasked P4/F8 outputs as materialized in stagev5 output/features/L/raw_stagev4
model_policy: Stagev5 classifier family/grid scale adapted to a late-first cascade architecture.
